actionUnits.condition: Simulate XRGrabInteractable.m_Activated (MonoBehaviour id 1135932914521357561, guid 0ad34abafad169848a38072baa96cdb2) which has m_Calls to Gun.TriggerPulled (param) and Gun.Shoot (no param). Manually invoke Gun.Shoot on Gun MonoBehaviour (id 8183513503680063775, guid d01186f01818ef24ead588d87fd2fea5). After ~1/fireRate (≈0.667s), when shootState returns to Ready, invoke Gun.Reload to test reloading path (text shows 'Reloading', AudioManager.Play('Reload')).

Validate that after reloadTime (2.5s), Gun returns to Ready with ammunition reset (ammunition=10 per scene config). Then shoot again to confirm readiness. This mirrors XRGrabInteractable.m_Activated.m_Calls to Gun.Shoot.

actionUnits.condition: Wait >= 1/fireRate (~0.667s) so Shoot can be called again after Shooting state returns to Ready. This simulates XRGrabInteractable.m_Activated (MonoBehaviour id 1135932914521357561, guid 0ad34abafad169848a38072baa96cdb2) which calls Gun.Shoot. Each Shoot instantiates 'Laser' prefab (GameObject id 6845118643277486568) at GunPov and sets its Rigidbody velocity.

Manually invoke Reload while Ready to test Reloading state (text shows 'Reloading', AudioManager.Play('Reload')). After reloadTime=2.5s, remainingAmmunition resets to scene config (10) and state returns to Ready, then Shoot once to validate.
